title: Question: Reason for error message: Unsupported: Non-constant inside []'s in the cell part of a dotted reference

features.name: array of packed struct indexed by loop variable with dotted member access
features.description: Code should include an array of packed structs accessed using a non-constant for-loop index followed by dotted struct member reference
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic stuff; } a_struct_t; a_struct_t [4-1:0] a_out; for (int i=0;i<4;i++) a_out[i].stuff = '0;

features.name: parameterized array of packed struct with struct member write in loop
features.description: Code should include a parameterized unpacked array of packed structs where struct members are assigned inside a for-loop using indexed access
features.snippet: parameter n = 4; output TEST_TYPES::a_struct [n-1:0] a_out; always_comb for (int i=0;i<n;i++) a_out[i].stuff = '0;
